name: Shijiazhuang Tonhe Electronics Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shijiazhuang Tonhe Electronics Technologies Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of high frequency switch mode power supply and related products in China and internationally. The company offers modular switch mode rectifiers, controller systems, and DC power supply systems; EV charging stations, including compact and separated DC fast chargers, AC chargers, and charger modules; on-board chargers and DC converters; and railway signal power supply, special power supply, and EPS products, as well as PV grid-connected inverters. Shijiazhuang Tonhe Electronics Technologies Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.
